# technitium_dhcp_reserved_lease (Resource)

Manages a reserved DHCP lease in a Technitium DNS Server DHCP scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_dhcp_reserved_lease" "server" {
  scope_name       = technitium_dhcp_scope.lan.name
  hardware_address = "00:11:22:33:44:55"
  address          = "192.168.1.10"
  hostname         = "fileserver"
  comments         = "NAS reserved IP"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The reserved IP address for the client.
- `hardware_address` (String) The MAC address of the client device. Stored in lowercase colon-separated format.
- `scope_name` (String) The name of the DHCP scope containing this reservation.

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Comments for this reserved lease entry.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the client.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the format scope_name:hardware_address.
